name: selected_site
baseline_case_role: Unconstrained resource-led benchmark retained for comparison only
likely_layout_axis: NW-SE rows with greater SW-NE wake spacing
key_constraints_comment: Watercourses internal slope pockets and constrained parcel edges favour adaptive staggered parcel-fitted layout design rather than a rigid uniform grid
development_opportunity: Large contiguous central parcel with realistic potential for first-phase constrained turbine placement and reduced parcel fragmentation relative to smaller surrounding suitable areas
development_limitation: Parcel shape is irregular and constrained by water slope ecology and edge effects; nearby smaller parcels are disconnected and excluded from first-pass optimisation
notes: Fid_7 is the preferred first parcel for constrained layout development; baseline 12-turbine case remains a fixed benchmark and this parcel will be assessed for feasible turbine capacity before considering additional parcels to recover benchmark project scale
